name: EDI Central Tracking — Operations (HLR BEESEDI-51860)
hypothesis: Vendor ops analysts will resolve blocked/rejected EDI orders within SLA when the Link Admin tool exposes the full pipeline, the firing business rule, and a rule-specific corrective action in one click.

metrics.name: Triage depth
metrics.threshold: ≥ 40% of sessions open ≥ 1 order detail (drawer or item page)

metrics.name: Rule-specific action completion
metrics.threshold: ≥ 60% of drawer opens on Blocked/Rejected orders end with a reprocess_completed event

metrics.name: Bulk workflow adoption
metrics.threshold: ≥ 25% of sessions that reprocess use a bulk-rule path (same-rule batch)

metrics.name: Resolution documentation
metrics.threshold: ≥ 30% of sessions that open the drawer add ≥ 1 resolution note (facilitated tests)

name: Notification Center — V1
hypothesis: Users who have a centralized notification center will act on alerts faster, reducing missed actions.
metric: ≥ 60% of testers click the notification bell and mark at least one item as read within 60 seconds
